'''ân-w-r-sh''' ('''kanawreshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cajole|cajole]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cajole|cajole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-w-r-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kanawreshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinawreshoko|thinawreshoko]] || [[word:jinawreshoko|jinawreshoko]] || [[word:shinawreshoko|shinawreshoko]] || [[word:kinawreshoko|kinawreshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonawreshoko|thonawreshoko]] || [[word:jonawreshoko|jonawreshoko]] || [[word:shonawreshoko|shonawreshoko]] || [[word:konawreshoko|konawreshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnawreshoko|thĂŠnawreshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnawreshoko|jĂŠnawreshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnawreshoko|shĂŠnawreshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnawreshoko|kĂŠnawreshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
